title: Alliant Energy Corporation (LNT) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:LNT ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Susan Gille - IR Manager John Larsen - Chair, President and CEO Robert Durian - EVP and CFO Conference Call Participants Dariusz Lozny - Bank of America Michael Sullivan - Wolfe Research Nick Campanella - Credit Suisse Ashar Khan - Verition Operator Thank you for holding, ladies and gentlemen, and welcome to Alliant Energy's Third Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all lines are in a listen-only mode.

title: Alliant Energy (LNT) Q3 Earnings Lag Estimates, Sales Up Y/Y
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) third-quarter earnings were lower than expectations. LNT aims to invest nearly $10 billion in 2022-2026 time period to strengthen its generation and distribution operations.

title: What's in Store for Alliant Energy (LNT) in Q3 Earnings?
text: Alliant Energy's (LNT) third-quarter earnings are expected to have gained from contributions coming from new solar projects, cost control measures and rising demand from customers.
